action_ref.content:
{ "analysis": "The web directory has been created. Now I'll create a simple HTML page for VNC web access and then start QEMU with Windows 3.11. I'll use a basic HTML page that provides information about the VNC connection, then start QEMU with the appropriate parameters.", "plan": "I'll create a simple HTML page for the VNC web interface, then start QEMU with the Windows 3.11 image using VNC on display :1 (port 5901), snapshot mode, and configure it for programmatic keyboard input. I'll also need to check nginx configuration to ensure it's serving from the correct directory.", "commands": [ { "keystrokes": "cat > /var/www/html/index.html << 'EOF' Windows 3.11 VNC Access

Windows 3.11 for Workgroups

VNC Server available at: localhost:5901

Use any VNC client to connect to display :1

QEMU is running Windows 3.11 in snapshot mode

EOF ", "duration": 0.1 } ] }
